ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the institution */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus areas of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution receiving funding for the project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the research project (e.g., science, humanities) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project resulting in the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_name FOREIGN KEY ("journal_name") REFERENCES journals ("journal_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oa_offsetting_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher participating in the agreement */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution participating in the agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the agreement */,
  "agreement_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agreement */,
  "agreement_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oa_offsetting_agreements_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oa_offsetting_agreements_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding program */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount allocated to the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the funding program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_profiles" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus areas of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., professor, postdoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., PI, co-PI, team member) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher left the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding decision */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project being funded */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding program supporting the project */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding decision */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the project */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the funding decision */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_decisions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES funding_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_decisions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
